title: adesmia kieslingii
intro: Adesmia kieslingii, also known as Chachacoma, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Adesmia kieslingii include the potential treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever reduction. Adesmia kieslingii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, with some herbal practitioners also using it in tinctures and topical applications.
